text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The race that decides the year's number one
racer. Hehe, everyone seems fired up.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But I'll burn the brightest. I've spent every waking
moment preparing for this day.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You better keep your eyes on me, Trainer. Until
the very end, you hear?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't want to miss the moment I become
the strongest, the fastest, and the best racer of
them all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That's just what I wanted to hear.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'd better be going. Time to show the world
who's number one!
